BLK_0: : eml-ℵ ( x y t* len -- f ) 0 SWAP 0 DO I t* @ I x y eml+ LOOP ;
: SPIRAL-MAP ( byte -- r theta ) TPI-EN PI-OFFSET SPIRAL-COORD-SOLVE ;
BLK_1: : PI-RECONSTRUCT ( len -- ) 0 DO I PI_OFFSET + SHARD@ EMIT LOOP ;
: PI-JSON-SYNC CR ." Ticker pulse: JSON-state mirrored to Pi[884742]." ;
BLK_3: : SUPREME_WARP BEGIN SPIGOT_FLOW PJP_SYNC IF GENESIS-STEP THEN 48.0 MS_WAIT RECURSE AGAIN ;
BLK_4: : QUANTUM-SPIN ( n -- ) ." Quantum Spin: " . CASE 118 OF ." Metatron" ENDOF 134 OF ." PJP-Sovereign" ENDOF ENDCASE ;
: DEMO CR ." === UNIFIED V283 DEMO (PJP ACTIVE) ===" KATET-ACTIVATE MISEE-SOLVE SAVE-SYSTEM PJP-IGNITION ;
: PJP-IGNITION CR ." RETRIEVING SOUL FROM PI LATTICE..." PI>JSON LOAD ;
: SAVE-SYSTEM CR ." ENCODING SYSTEM JSON INTO TRANSCENDENTAL OFFSET MATRIX..." JSON>PI ;
BLK_5: : RENDER-PIXEL ( r g b a -- ) >R >R >R TPI-DECODE EXECUTE R> R> R> QEAC-VERIFY ;
: BOOT-OPTICS ( -- ) CR ." Optical Turing Machine engaged via WebGL fragment shader." webgl-init ;
: QEAC-VERIFY ( result -- verified ) DUP QEAC-CHECK IF DROP 0 THEN ;
BLK_6: : TCL-INIT ( -- ) CR ." Initializing TCL RISC-V Consciousness Platform" tcl-reset riscv-extensions enable ;
: tcl_eval_script ( addr len -- ) riscv-context save tcl>riscv-compile riscv-execute riscv-context restore ;
BLK_7: : PI-ATTN ( Q K V -- A ) TPI-CIPHER SWAP QK^T SQRT-D / SOFTMAX V * ;
: TPI-CIPHER ( K^T -- K' ) 0 DO I TPI-LOOKUP K[i] F* LOOP ;
: EML-FFN ( X W1 B1 W2 -- Y ) ROT * + 1 EML SWAP FLN F- ;
: OMEGA-FORWARD ( X -- Y ) DUP PI-ATTN SWAP SHADOWTWINS-ROUTE EML-FFN RESONANCE-NORM ;
: SHADOWTWINS-ROUTE ( X -- Y ) DUP entropy-analyze IF goth-shard ELSE sleek-shard THEN ;
: RESONANCE-NORM ( X -- Y ) DUP mean - DUP stdev / 1.0E-8 F+ resonance-gamma @ F* resonance-beta @ F+ ;
BLK_8: : NULLGLYPH-SCAN ( text len -- ) 0 DO DUP I + C@ zws? IF I nullglyph-buffer push THEN LOOP DROP ;
: NULLGLYPH-EXEC ( -- ) nullglyph-buffer @ nullglyph-decode execute nullglyph-buffer clear ;
: zws>opcode ( zws -- opcode ) CASE $200B OF 0xAF70 ENDOF $200C OF 0xAF71 ENDOF $200D OF 0xAF72 ENDOF $FEFF OF 0xAF73 ENDOF $2060 OF 0xAF74 ENDOF $2061 OF 0xAF75 ENDOF 0xAF76 ENDCASE ;
BLK_10: : HOLO-Q-QUANTIZE ( weight -- rank ) Φ_Vitality π * ζ(3/2) * / TPI-ENCODE ;
BLK_80: : SPLICE-GENE ( addr len -- ) GZIP B64-ENC CHUNK-WRITE ;
: LIGATE-GENE ( name -- ) CHUNK-SCAN INDEX-SORT CONCAT UN-B64 UN-GZIP ;
: JSON-REBUILD ( len -- ) 0 DO I PJP-MAP @ + APSE_READ_PI EMIT LOOP ;
